person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
John Honywood (Honiwood), Esquire was born about 1466 in Postling, Kent, England. He was the son of Thomas de Honiwood and Thomasina Lovelace. He died at Evington, Kent, England after 1534. Birth year estimated as 1466: John witnessed a will in 1487. John was married twice. 

«b»1st Marriage«/b»
John Honywood married Agnes the daughter of Judge Martin of Graveney. They possibly had fifteen children. Only one child listed on pedigree.

John Honiwood (Honeywood) of Postling, died 22 April 1576, married Mildred the daughter of John Hales, Baron of Excheq.

«b»2nd Marriage«/b»
He married 2nd, Alice Barnes, daughter of William Barnes and Bennet Lewknor of Sussex. She was the widow of Richard Woodward. They had one son and possibly two daughters.

1.) Robert Honywood, Esq. born 18 September 1525, died 22 April 1576, he married Mary Atwaters, the daughter of Robert Atwaters of Royton.

«b»Offices Held«/b»
1492/1493: Chamberlain, Hythe
1494: Bailiff to Yarmouth
1501: Jurat
1502 & 1510, Bailiff 
1514, Subsidy Commissioner

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Honywood於1493年出生在英國肯特波斯特林時，他的父親Thomas Honywood33歲，母親Thomasina Lovelace34歲。他於1515年與Agnes Martin在英國肯特波斯特林聖 瑪麗 安德 聖 拉德根達斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1534年在英國肯特艾爾姆斯泰德享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Honywood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Honeywood in Postling (Kent), which was named in Old English with hunig ‘honey’ + wudu ‘wood’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Honywood was born in 1493, in Postling, Kent, England, his father, Thomas Honywood, was 33 and his mother, Thomasina Lovelace, was 34. He married Agnes Martin in 1515, in St Mary And St Radegund's Church, Postling, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1534, in Elmsted, Kent, England, at the age of 42.

Il a épousé Agnes Martin en 1515, à St Mary And St Radegund's Church, Postling, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Lui sposato Agnes Martin nel 1515, nel St Mary And St Radegund's Church, Postling, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ko.St Mary's Church, Nonington, Kent, Engla: 영국 켄트 넌잉턴 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.St Mary And St Radegund's Church, Postli: 영국 켄트 포스틀링 스트 메리 앤드 스트 라데건드'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Honywood(이)가 1493년 영국 켄트 포스틀링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Honywood(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasina Lovelace(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1515년 영국 켄트 포스틀링 스트 메리 앤드 스트 라데건드'스 c후르치에서 Agnes Martin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1534년 영국 켄트 엘스테드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Honywood nasceu em 1493, em Postling, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Honywood, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Thomasina Lovelace, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Martin em 1515, em St Mary And St Radegund's Church, Postling, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1534, em Elmsted, Kent, Inglaterra, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Honywood родился в 1493 г. в местности постлинг, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Honywood было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Thomasina Lovelace, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Martin в 1515 г. в местности ст мэри анд ст радегунд'с чурч, постлинг, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1534 г. в местности элмстед, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

Se casó con Agnes Martin en 1515, en St Mary And St Radegund's Church, Postling, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1534, en Elmsted, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
